case_title: ETCHEVERRIA, ANNA MARIE DBA COLEVERRIA VS UNITED SALVAGE INTERNATIONAL, LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLTF RE SMALL CLAIMS HRG REQUEST TO ADVANCE CONTINUANCE AND OBJECTION TO LATE CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ETCHEVERRIA, ANNA MARIE DBA COLEVERRIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED SALVAGE INTERNATIONAL, LLC $2,297.59 PRINCIPAL, $248.91 INTEREST, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,655.50, THE COURT AMENDS THE CLAIM TO ADD UNITED SALVAGE INTERNATIONAL, LLC AS A PARTY DEFENDANT, AND DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT JEFFREY LEE VARNELL AS AN INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED SALVAGE INTERNATIONAL, LLC
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2006, DISCHARGED AS TO THIRD PARTY VARNELL, JEFFREY LEE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,903.05 FILED BY ETCHEVERRIA, ANNA MARIE DBA COLEVERRIA AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED SALVAGE INTERNATIONAL, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-27-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-28-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE BY DEFENDANT.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JEFFREY LEE VARNELL
DEFT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. ORDER TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY VARNELL, JEFFREY LEE HEARING SET FOR AUG-03-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-19-2006 AS TO THIRD PARTY VARNELL, JEFFREY LEE
